title: pinus yunnanensis subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Pinus yunnanensis subsp. tenuifolia, also known as Yunnan pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its resinous compounds. The health benefits of Pinus yunnanensis subsp. tenuifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, relieve coughs, and support overall well-being.
